title: Patch<T> missing From<Option<T>> conversion
description: Patch<T> has From<T> (Some value -> Set), but lacks From<Option<T>>. The natural conversion is: Some(v) -> Set(v), None -> Keep. Callers who compute an Option<T> from elsewhere and want to include it in a patch currently must write manual match blocks. This is a common pattern: e.g. building a ChatPatch from user input where a field may or may not have changed. Fix: add impl<T> From<Option<T>> for Patch<T> { fn from(opt: Option<T>) -> Self { match opt { Some(v) => Patch::Set(v), None => Patch::Keep } } }
